title: Support chat text message delivery
description:
After the chat-connect fixes, support sessions could open but typed messages never appeared for the other party. POST /chat/messages could reject the sender when user ids were normalized differently than session participants, and /chat/active could return a stale pending session instead of the live active chat — which blocked the composer and message poll on reconnect.

Backend now resolves auth user ids consistently for participant checks and prefers active sessions over orphaned pending rows. Frontend promotes admin chat to live send/poll mode when the server confirms active status, surfaces send errors instead of silently dropping text, and keeps polling while a session id is known.

Who is affected: PipeShare support chat on the private OVH server (pipeshare.live). SaaS when the next platform version is applied in cPanel releases.
changeLog: Fix support chat POST participant matching with stable auth user ids.
Prefer active over stale pending rows in /chat/active lookup.
Admin chat send/poll unlocks when server reports session active.
Show a warning when chat message POST fails instead of silent drop.
Participant fallback in /chat/active includes admin_user_id as well as customer.
